/usr/sbin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/Agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/LinkFetcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/SiteScraper.cpp.o -o MyProject  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ronen/scraper/build/bin /usr/lib64/libcurl.so -lgumbo bin/libllama.so.0.0.9025 /usr/lib64/libcurl.so bin/libggml.so.0.10.2 bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.10.2 bin/libggml-base.so.0.10.2
